```{r, cache=TRUE}
      c(
        "Dispatching",
        "foreach",
        "magrittr"
      )
    ) %dopar% {
    
    equilibrium_small$parameter$lambda_w <- param_value
    result_demand <- 
      solve_demand_shock(
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      )
    equilibrium_small <-
      update_demand_ea_beta(
        result_demand = result_demand,
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      ) 
        
    c_w <- 
      compute_supply_shock_c_w_tj(
        m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
        m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
        beta_w = equilibrium$parameter$beta_w,
        lambda_w = param_value,
        x_a_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_w,
        size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
        size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
        mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
        ea_w = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_w,
        f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f,
        w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w,
        s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f,
        s_w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_w,
        owner = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$owner,
        method_s_w = equilibrium$constant$method_s_w,
        margin = equilibrium$constant$margin,
        quadrature_size = equilibrium$constant$quadrature_size,
        tol = equilibrium$constant$tol
      )
    s_w_d_w_tj <- 
        solve_s_w_d_w_tj(
          m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
          m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
          beta_w = equilibrium$parameter$beta_w,
          lambda_w = param_value,
          x_a_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_w,
          size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
          size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
          mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
          ea_w = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_w,
          w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w,
          s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f,
          method_s_w = equilibrium$constant$method_s_w,
          margin = equilibrium$constant$margin,
          quadrature_size = equilibrium$constant$quadrature_size,
          tol = equilibrium$constant$tol
        )
    s_w_d_w_tj <- diag(s_w_d_w_tj)
    s_w_d_w <- -equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_w/s_w_d_w_tj
    s_w_d_w <- s_w_d_w[i]
    obj <- c_w[i]

      return(
        data.frame(
          value = param_value,
          objective = obj,
          s_w_d_w = s_w_d_w
        )
      )
    }


g_7 <-
  ggplot(
    objective_values_7, 
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = objective
    )
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(
      color = objective > 0
      )
    ) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(
  yintercept = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f[i] - equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w[i],
  color = "blue", 
  linetype = "solid"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = objective_values_7,  
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = s_w_d_w
      ),
    color = "green",
    size = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda_w",
    y = "c_w ths 1"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = "black", "TRUE" = "red"),
    name = "c_w > 0"
  ) 
g_7

```

#### lambda_f
```{r, cache=TRUE}
# reset lambda_w and lambda_f
equilibrium_small$parameter$lambda_w <- equilibrium$parameter$lambda_w
equilibrium_small$parameter$lambda_f <- equilibrium$parameter$lambda_f

objective_values_8 <- 
  foreach(
    param_value = target_list[[2]],
    .combine = "rbind",
    .packages = 
      c(
        "Dispatching",
        "foreach",
        "magrittr"
      )
    ) %dopar% {
    
    equilibrium_small$parameter$lambda_f <- param_value
    result_demand <- 
      solve_demand_shock(
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      )
    equilibrium_small <-
      update_demand_ea_beta(
        result_demand = result_demand,
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      ) 
    c_w <- 
      compute_supply_shock_c_w_tj(
        m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
        m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
        beta_w = equilibrium$parameter$beta_w,
        lambda_w = equilibrium$parameter$lambda_w,
        x_a_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_w,
        size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
        size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
        mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
        ea_w = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_w,
        f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f,
        w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w,
        s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f,
        s_w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_w,
        owner = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$owner,
        method_s_w = equilibrium$constant$method_s_w,
        margin = equilibrium$constant$margin,
        quadrature_size = equilibrium$constant$quadrature_size,
        tol = equilibrium$constant$tol
      )
    s_f_d_f <- 
      solve_s_f_d_f_tj(
        m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
        m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
        beta_f = equilibrium$parameter$beta_f,
        lambda_f = param_value,
        x_a_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_f,
        size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
        size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
        mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
        ea_f = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_f,
        f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f,
        s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f
      )
          
    s_w_d_f <- 
      solve_s_w_d_f_tj(
        m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
        m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
        beta_w = equilibrium$parameter$beta_w,
        beta_f = equilibrium$parameter$beta_f,
        lambda_w = equilibrium$parameter$lambda_w,
        lambda_f = param_value,
        x_a_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_w,
        x_a_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_f,
        size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
        size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
        mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
        ea_w = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_w,
        ea_f = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_f,
        w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w,
        f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f,
        s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f,
        method_s_w = equilibrium$constant$method_s_w,
        margin = equilibrium$constant$margin,
        quadrature_size = equilibrium$constant$quadrature_size,
        tol = equilibrium$constant$tol
      ) 
          
    meeting_number <- 
      compute_meeting_number_tj(
        m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
        m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
        size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
        size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
        mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
        s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f
      ) 
      
    meeting_number_d_f <- 
      compute_meeting_number_d_f_tj(
        m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
        m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
        size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
        size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
        mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
        s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f,
        s_f_d_f = s_f_d_f
      ) 
    owner <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$owner
    o <- t(owner) %*% owner
    f <- equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$f
    w <- equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w
    s_w <- equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_w
    size_f <- equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f
    
    b <-  meeting_number * s_w +
      (o * meeting_number_d_f) %*% (s_w * (f - w - c_w)) +
      (o * s_w_d_f) %*% (meeting_number * (f - w - c_w)) 
    
    A <-  (o * s_f_d_f) * size_f
    
    #ridge regularization
    cond_A <- kappa(A)
    
    # Threshold for acceptable conditioning (commonly 1e12)
    if (cond_A < 1e12) {
      condition_c_f <- "well-conditioned"
      c_f <- Matrix::solve(A, b)
    } else {
      condition_c_f <- "ill-conditioned"
      epsilon <- 1e-10
      A_reg <- A + epsilon * diag(ncol(A))
      c_f <- Matrix::solve(A_reg, b)
    }
    obj <- c_f[i]
    term_1 <- (meeting_number * s_w) / diag( (o * s_f_d_f) * size_f)
    term_2 <- (o * s_w_d_f) %*% (meeting_number * (f - w - c_w)) / diag( (o * s_f_d_f) * size_f)
    term_3 <- (o * meeting_number_d_f) %*% (s_w * (f - w - c_w)) / diag( (o * s_f_d_f) * size_f)
      
      return(
        data.frame(
          value = param_value,
          objective = obj,
          term_1 = term_1[i],
          term_2 = term_2[i],
          term_3 = term_3[i]
        )
      )
    }


g_8 <-
  ggplot(
    objective_values_8, 
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = objective
    )
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(
      color = objective > 0
      )
    ) +  
  geom_point(
    data = objective_values_8,  
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = term_1
      ),
    color = "#ff7f0e",
    size = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = objective_values_8,  
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = term_2
      ),
    color = "#2ca02c",
    size = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = objective_values_8,  
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = term_3
      ),
    color = "#1f77b4",
    size = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda_f",
    y = "c_f ths 1"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = 
      c(
        "FALSE" = "black", 
        "TRUE" = "red"
        ),  
    name = "c_f > 0"  # Legend title
  ) 
```

```{r}
g8 <-
  ggplot(
    objective_values_8, 
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = objective
    )
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(
      color = objective > 0
    )
  ) +  
  geom_point(
    data = objective_values_8,  
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = term_1
    ),
    color = "#ff7f0e",
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = objective_values_8,  
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = term_2
    ),
    color = "#2ca02c",
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = objective_values_8,  
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = term_3
    ),
    color = "#1f77b4",
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda_f",
    y = "c_f ths 1"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "FALSE" = "black", 
      "TRUE" = "red"
    ),  
    name = "c_f > 0"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 0,
    y = -100,
    label = "term 1",
    color =  "#ff7f0e"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 0,
    y = -300,
    label = "term 2",
    color = "#2ca02c"
  )  +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 0,
    y = -200,
    label = "term 3",
    color = "#1f77b4"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    ylim = 
      c(
        -500, 
        500
        )
    )  # This restricts the y-axis range
```

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, out.width='100%'}
gridExtra::grid.arrange(
  g8, 
  g_8, 
  ncol=2
  )
```


# Why $\frac{\partial s_i^W}{\partial w_i}$ is not monotone in $\lambda_w$?

- From the above graph, pick up the point before and after the jump in $\frac{\partial s_i^W}{\partial w_i}$.
- Check why this is so different.


```{r}
# reset equilibrium
equilibrium_small <- equilibrium
equilibrium_small$constant$method_s_w <- "exact"

num_ths <- 
  foreach(
    t = seq_along(equilibrium$endogenous),
    .combine = "rbind"
  ) %do% {
    foreach(
      j = seq_along(equilibrium$endogenous[[t]]),
    .combine = "rbind"
    ) %do% {
      num <- length(equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w)
      return(
        data.frame(
          t = t,
          j = j,
          num = num
        )
      )
    }
  }

large_market <- 
  num_ths %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    num >= 5
  )

large_market <- 
  large_market[
    order(
      large_market$t,
      large_market$j,
      decreasing = TRUE
    ), 
  ]
for (
  i in 1:nrow(large_market)
) {
  equilibrium_small$shock[[large_market$t[i]]][[large_market$j[i]]] <- NULL
  equilibrium_small$endogenous[[large_market$t[i]]][[large_market$j[i]]] <- NULL
  equilibrium_small$exogenous[[large_market$t[i]]][[large_market$j[i]]] <- NULL
}

```

## normal market
```{r}
t <- 1
j <- 1
```

### normal ths 1
```{r}
i <- 2
```

```{r}

obj_s_w_d_w <- 
  foreach(
    param_value = target_list[[1]],
    .combine = "rbind",
    .packages = 
      c(
        "Dispatching",
        "foreach",
        "magrittr"
      )
    ) %dopar% {
    
    equilibrium_small$parameter$lambda_w <- param_value
    result_demand <- 
      solve_demand_shock(
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      )
    equilibrium_small <-
      update_demand_ea_beta(
        result_demand = result_demand,
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      ) 
    s_w_d_w_tj <- 
        solve_s_w_d_w_tj(
          m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
          m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
          beta_w = equilibrium$parameter$beta_w,
          lambda_w = param_value,
          x_a_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_w,
          size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
          size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
          mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
          ea_w = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_w,
          w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w,
          s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f,
          method_s_w = equilibrium$constant$method_s_w,
          margin = equilibrium$constant$margin,
          quadrature_size = equilibrium$constant$quadrature_size,
          tol = equilibrium$constant$tol
        )
    s_w_d_w_tj <- diag(s_w_d_w_tj)
    obj <- s_w_d_w_tj[i]

      return(
        data.frame(
          value = param_value,
          objective = obj
        )
      )
    }


g_s_w_d_w <-
  ggplot(
    obj_s_w_d_w, 
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = objective
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda_w",
    y = "s_w_d_w ths 1"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = "black", "TRUE" = "red"),
    name = "c_w > 0"
  ) 
g_s_w_d_w 

```


### normal ths 2
```{r}
i <- 3
```

```{r}

obj_s_w_d_w <- 
  foreach(
    param_value = target_list[[1]],
    .combine = "rbind",
    .packages = 
      c(
        "Dispatching",
        "foreach",
        "magrittr"
      )
    ) %dopar% {
    
    equilibrium_small$parameter$lambda_w <- param_value
    result_demand <- 
      solve_demand_shock(
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      )
    equilibrium_small <-
      update_demand_ea_beta(
        result_demand = result_demand,
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      ) 
    s_w_d_w_tj <- 
        solve_s_w_d_w_tj(
          m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
          m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
          beta_w = equilibrium$parameter$beta_w,
          lambda_w = param_value,
          x_a_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_w,
          size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
          size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
          mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
          ea_w = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_w,
          w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w,
          s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f,
          method_s_w = equilibrium$constant$method_s_w,
          margin = equilibrium$constant$margin,
          quadrature_size = equilibrium$constant$quadrature_size,
          tol = equilibrium$constant$tol
        )
    s_w_d_w_tj <- diag(s_w_d_w_tj)
    obj <- s_w_d_w_tj[i]

      return(
        data.frame(
          value = param_value,
          objective = obj
        )
      )
    }


g_s_w_d_w <-
  ggplot(
    obj_s_w_d_w, 
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = objective
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda_w",
    y = "s_w_d_w ths 2"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = "black", "TRUE" = "red"),
    name = "c_w > 0"
  ) 
g_s_w_d_w 

```

## problematic ths

```{r}
t <- 1
j <- 7
i <- 2
```

```{r}

obj_s_w_d_w <- 
  foreach(
    param_value = target_list[[1]],
    .combine = "rbind",
    .packages = 
      c(
        "Dispatching",
        "foreach",
        "magrittr"
      )
    ) %dopar% {
    
    equilibrium_small$parameter$lambda_w <- param_value
    result_demand <- 
      solve_demand_shock(
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      )
    equilibrium_small <-
      update_demand_ea_beta(
        result_demand = result_demand,
        equilibrium = equilibrium_small
      ) 
    s_w_d_w_tj <- 
        solve_s_w_d_w_tj(
          m_w = equilibrium$parameter$m_w,
          m_f = equilibrium$parameter$m_f,
          beta_w = equilibrium$parameter$beta_w,
          lambda_w = param_value,
          x_a_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$x_a_w,
          size_w = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_w,
          size_f = equilibrium$exogenous[[t]][[j]]$size_f,
          mu = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$mu,
          ea_w = equilibrium$shock[[t]][[j]]$ea_w,
          w = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$w,
          s_f = equilibrium$endogenous[[t]][[j]]$s_f,
          method_s_w = equilibrium$constant$method_s_w,
          margin = equilibrium$constant$margin,
          quadrature_size = equilibrium$constant$quadrature_size,
          tol = equilibrium$constant$tol
        )
    s_w_d_w_tj <- diag(s_w_d_w_tj)
    obj <- s_w_d_w_tj[i]

      return(
        data.frame(
          value = param_value,
          objective = obj
        )
      )
    }


g_s_w_d_w <-
  ggplot(
    obj_s_w_d_w, 
    aes(
      x = value, 
      y = objective
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda_w",
    y = "s_w_d_w ths 1"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = "black", "TRUE" = "red"),
    name = "c_w > 0"
  ) 
g_s_w_d_w 

```
